rows.label: qev090102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well? Get to work!
Don't keep me waiting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0002
rows.name:
And remember you're bein' evaluated here.
Disappoint me and I'll flatten you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0003
rows.name:
How them jobs I gave you
comin' along, superstar?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0004
rows.name: All right... All riiight...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0005
rows.name:
Looks like they're done. You
have a hard time or what?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev090102_SEL0011
rows.name: Say they were a nightmare.

rows.label: qev090102_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev090102_SEL0021
rows.name: Say they were easy.

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0006
rows.name:
Course they were! Can't test your mettle
by havin' ya pick daisies, now can I?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0007
rows.name:
What's that? I said they were easy? Bah,
who cares what I said? Ancient history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0008
rows.name: Gotta move forward, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yeah? I picked nasty ones on purpose
so I could test your mettle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0010
rows.name: But hey, guess you're a real big shot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0011
rows.name:
Well, you pass. Congrats! As of today,
you're partners with the legendary Yelv.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0012
rows.name:
You've been deemed worthy of tacklin'
Testamenter missions by my side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0013
rows.name: Just had to sniff out your skills first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0014
rows.name:
Yeah, it's quite the honor. Went through
a whole pile of candidates before you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Right, enough yappin'. What
say we christen this new
partnership with an assignment?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Next stop, Quest Board. Let's
hope they got somethin' fun.[ST:wait ]
